available.name: Map
available.description: Interactive Mapbox map with smart clustering, 7 color schemes, tooltips, lasso selection, and drawing tools. Handles 25,000+ assets.

available.name: ProductionChart
available.description: Canvas-based time series with dual Y-axis, zoom, brush controls, and annotation markers. 10K+ data points at 60fps.

available.name: AssetDetailCard
available.description: Auto-generated detail panel from asset properties. Production chart, custom sections, mobile drawer.

available.name: OverlayManager
available.description: Drag-and-drop file uploads for KMZ, KML, GeoJSON, and Shapefiles. Per-feature visibility and layer controls.

available.name: MapControls
available.description: Toolbar with pan, zoom, fullscreen, center, drawing modes, and layer toggle controls.

roadmap.name: AssetStore
roadmap.description: Three storage backends: InMemory, LocalStorage, and SQLite (WASM). Full import/export and migration utilities.

roadmap.name: DeclineCurve
roadmap.description: Decline curve analysis with Arps, Duong, and stretched exponential models. Interactive forecast dragging.

roadmap.name: FilterPanel
roadmap.description: Smart filtering by operator, basin, status, well type, and production ranges with real-time map updates.

roadmap.name: TypeCurves
roadmap.description: Multi-well type curves with P10/P50/P90 percentile bands and production comparison mode.

roadmap.name: AssetTable
roadmap.description: Sortable, filterable data table with inline editing, CSV export, and map selection sync.

roadmap.name: PipelineViewer
roadmap.description: Pipeline network visualization with flow direction, pressure gradients, and facility connections.
